ModMetaData.name: VRE Archon (HSK/CE Patched)
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson, Taranchuk, Reann Shepard, xrushha — HSK/CE patch by CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE-patched standalone version of Vanilla Races Expanded — Archon, tuned for the Hardcore SK modpack.
This bundles the upstream VRE Archon mod content with HSK conventions and Combat Extended patches baked in. Do NOT enable the Steam Workshop version of VRE Archon alongside this — they would duplicate each other's defs.
CE patches: - VREA_MeleeWeapon_ArchobladeBladelink (archotech psychic blade) — both tools converted to CombatExtended.ToolCE: * handle (Blunt) — Sharp 0.3 / Blunt 3.0 * blade (VREA_Sear capacity, custom psychic-skip damage) — Sharp 3 / Blunt 5 (high AP for archotech weapon) * Custom thingClass VREArchon.ArchoBlade preserved - VREA_Apparel_Archoplate (archotech psychic armor) rescaled to HSK CE archotech tier: * Sharp 1.15 → 30, Blunt 0.60 → 25 (between marine 24 and power armor 40+) * Heat 0.86 kept (already CE-compatible) * Added Bulk 12 / WornBulk 4.5 * equippedStatOffsets preserved (PsychicSensitivity, PsychicEntropyMax, PsychicEntropyRecoveryRate) - VRE_Leatherskin gene (natural leathery skin) — Sharp 0.15 / Blunt 0.1 → HSK CE 5/5
Psychic projectiles (PsychicThrow, PsychicWarp, PsychicLance) work under CE as-is — they use vanilla projectile properties with armorPenetrationBase already set, and are psycaster-cast (Verb_CastAbility) rather than weapon-fired, so no CE conversion needed.
No HSK material conversion — Archon has no buildings, no recipes, no costLists. Archoplate and Archoblade are loot/quest-reward only.
Faction raid gating: - VRE_Archons faction had earliestRaidDays:45 (good) but no raidCommonalityFromPointsCurve, so raids fired at full force after Day 45 regardless of colony wealth. ArchonWarrior combatPower is 450 (archotech-elite tier — vs vanilla pirate 110, centipede 480). - Added wealth-based ramp: 0 commonality below 2500 threat points, scaling to 1.0 at 5000+. Matches the HSK Wolfein MegaCorp gate pattern but with a higher threshold reflecting the even-more-elite archotech tier. Combined with the existing 45-day delay, players have time to prepare for archotech raids.
Original mod by Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson, Taranchuk, Reann Shepard, xrushha. HSK/CE conversion + bundling by CarbineAction.
Required: Hardcore SK, Combat Extended, Vanilla Expanded Framework, Biotech DLC, Royalty DLC.
